creator: scjamorim@bsd.com.br
text:
Error:

http://people.freebsd.org/~sylvio/p5-DBD-cego-1.1.9.log

The port have depends to
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.10.1/mach/DBI.pm but the port
databases/cego not install this file, I believe that the depends is
other, maybe the port p5-DBI and not databases/cego.

The plist must have the variables to perl and not full path, ex.:
%%SITE_PERL%%, %%SITE_ARCH%%, ...
